title: Set a UBI Reminder
description: Set a recurring reminder on your real-world phone so you never miss a dUSD payout.

dialogue.text: Want help remembering to claim your basic income each day? I can't set phone alarms in-game, but I can walk you through a quick setup.

options.text: Yes, show me how to set it on my phone.

dialogue.text: Open your phone's reminder or calendar app. Create a recurring reminder for your daily UBI claim, choose a time you'll actually notice, and name it something obvious like 'Claim dUSD'.

options.text: Open the basic-income process so I can match the reminder time to my claim routine.
Done — recurring phone reminder is set.

dialogue.text: Perfect. This reminder lives on your real-world phone, so you'll get a nudge even when you're away from the game.
